description.en: build in public, ship frequently, and grow an audience — the solo dev who does it all
description.zh: 公开构建、频繁发布、积累受众——一人搞定所有事的独立开发者

goal.en: Build, ship, and grow as a solo developer
goal.zh: 独立开发：构建、发布、增长

outcome.en: Manage GitHub from the terminal, delegate boilerplate and tests to a coding agent, announce releases on X to build an audience, and package your best workflows into reusable skills — so each project makes you faster than the last.
outcome.zh: 从终端管理 GitHub，把样板代码和测试委托给 coding agent，在 X 上发布版本动态积累受众，把最好的工作流打包成可复用 Skill——让每个项目都比上一个更高效。

reason.en: Manage PRs, Issues, and CI from the terminal — stay close to the code without context switching.
reason.zh: 从终端管理 PR、Issue 和 CI——贴近代码，无需切换上下文。

en: List my open PRs and flag anything blocking
What's the CI status on my current branch?
Create an issue for the bug I just found
zh: 列出我的开放 PR，标出有 blocking 的
当前分支的 CI 状态怎么样？
为我刚发现的 bug 创建一个 issue

reason.en: Delegate test generation, boilerplate, and repetitive refactors to Claude Code or Codex — stay in flow on the parts only you can do.
reason.zh: 把测试生成、样板代码和重复性重构委托给 Claude Code 或 Codex——专注于只有你能做的部分。

en: Delegate writing tests for this module to Claude Code
Have Codex scaffold the API routes for this feature
Run this refactor in a background agent
zh: 让 Claude Code 为这个模块生成测试
让 Codex 生成这个功能的 API 路由脚手架
在后台 agent 中执行这个重构

reason.en: Announce releases, share what you're building, and engage with users who reply — building in public is how indie devs grow.
reason.zh: 发布版本公告、分享构建过程、回应用户——公开构建是独立开发者增长的方式。

en: Check my X mentions since yesterday
Search for people asking about this type of tool
zh: 发布 v1.0 上线公告
检查昨天以来的 X 提及
搜索在问这类工具的人

reason.en: Package your best repeatable workflows into AgentSkills you can reuse across projects or share with the community.
reason.zh: 把你最好的可重复工作流打包成 AgentSkill，跨项目复用或分享给社区。

en: Package this deploy workflow as a reusable skill
Create a skill that automates my release checklist
Audit my SKILL.md for best practices
zh: 把这个部署工作流打包成可复用 Skill
创建一个自动执行我发布检查清单的 Skill
审查我的 SKILL.md 是否符合最佳实践

installAll: clawhub install openclaw/github openclaw/coding-agent openclaw/xurl anthropics/skill-creator
